title: COMMENT
text: COMMENT Operation called by the SAX parser when it encounters a comment in the XML document. Explain this code operation COMMENT params string Comment: in endparams Implement your code here end; COMMENT operation Copy Parameters Comment —value defined within the <!-- and --> XML comment delimitors Description This operation is called by the parser whenever a comment is encountered in the XML document. For example, if the following comment is encountered, the value of the Comment parameter is "This is an XML comment" . Explain this code <!-- This is an XML comment --> Copy Was this topic helpful?
